title: Aureline package-action and package-action audit-event boundary
description: Boundary schema for one package_action_record or one package_action_audit_event_record frozen in docs/package/package_action_contract.md. Every integrated package operation (search, install, upgrade, downgrade, remove, pin, audit, restore-from-checkpoint) emits exactly one package_action_record on its review surface; every admit / apply / deny / rollback / consent step emits exactly one package_action_audit_event_record on the package_action audit stream. Raw manifest bodies, raw lockfile bodies, raw post-install script bodies, raw native-toolchain command lines, raw registry URLs, raw OAuth tokens, raw .npmrc / .pypirc / .cargo / credentials token bytes, raw mTLS material, raw vendored-directory absolute paths, and raw author identity strings never cross this boundary; the record carries opaque refs, integer-bucket counts, typed vocabulary, and reviewable sentences only. Adding a package_action_class, manifest_scope_class, registry_source_class, registry_auth_mode_class, script_risk_class, lockfile_impact_class, transitive_impact_class, rollback_posture_class, mirror_or_offline_state_class, surface_class, expected_validation_task_class, apply_outcome_class, audit_event_id, or denial_reason_class value is additive-minor and bumps package_action_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row co-signed by security_trust_review and product_scope_review.

package_action_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this package-action vocabulary. Additive-minor vocabulary additions bump this integer.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable, snake_case-safe id. Safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in admin exports, support bundles, release evidence, and boundary-manifest rows. Raw URLs, raw host names, raw IPs, raw absolute paths, raw author identity strings, raw tokens, and raw secret bytes never appear here.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short, reviewable sentence safe for banners, admin exports, support packets, and diagnostics cards. Raw URLs, raw payloads, raw lockfile bodies, raw manifest bodies, raw script bodies, and raw secret material MUST NOT appear.

monotonic_timestamp.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

redaction_class.description: Redaction class re-exported from the support / release vocabulary.

workspace_trust_state_class.description: Workspace-trust state re-exported from the identity / workspace family. Mutation-class package actions are admissible only under workspace_trust_trusted (with restore_lockfile_to_checkpoint admissible under workspace_trust_session_only_temporary).

package_action_class.description: Closed package-action class. search_for_package_metadata and audit_only_no_state_change are read-only; the rest are mutation-class actions and the schema enforces typed lockfile / transitive / rollback values on them.

manifest_scope_class.description: Manifest scope. out_of_tree_global_manifest_admin_only covers system / global package operations and is admissible only on self_hosted_org or managed_workspace identity modes with a non-null out_of_tree_global_manifest_envelope.

registry_auth_mode_class.description: Registry auth mode. Raw secrets in workspace state are forbidden; observed raw secrets surface through raw_secret_in_workspace_state_observed and deny on every action class except audit_only_no_state_change.

manifest_locator_ref.description: Opaque ref into the workspace's manifest registry. Raw absolute paths and raw repository URLs MUST NOT appear here.

package_coordinate_ref.description: Opaque coordinate ref naming the package this action targets. Raw package names + version strings are not surfaced here; the coordinate registry resolves the human label.

out_of_tree_global_manifest_envelope.description: Required non-null when manifest_scope_class is out_of_tree_global_manifest_admin_only; null otherwise. Allows system / global package operations to carry admin attribution without inventing a per-adapter envelope.

registry_endpoint_ref.description: Opaque ref into the registry-endpoint registry. Raw URLs, raw host names, and raw IPs MUST NOT appear here.

secret_broker_handle_ref.description: Required non-null when registry_auth_mode_class is secret_broker_handle_auth; null otherwise.

delegated_identity_handle_ref.description: Required non-null when registry_auth_mode_class is delegated_identity_auth; null otherwise.

policy_injected_credential_ref.description: Required non-null when registry_auth_mode_class is policy_injected_credential_auth; null otherwise.

managed_service_identity_ref.description: Required non-null when registry_auth_mode_class is managed_service_identity_auth; null otherwise.

mtls_client_certificate_ref.description: Required non-null when registry_auth_mode_class is mtls_client_certificate_auth; null otherwise.

device_flow_callback_ref.description: Required non-null when registry_auth_mode_class is device_flow_callback_auth; null otherwise.

raw_secret_in_workspace_state_observed.description: True only on audit_only_no_state_change actions that scanned the workspace and observed a raw secret. On every other action class this MUST be false; otherwise the action denies with raw_secret_in_workspace_state_forbidden.

added_entry_count_bucket.description: Approximate count of newly added lockfile entries. Coarse bucket; raw lockfile bodies MUST NOT appear.

expected_validation_tasks.description: Set of validation tasks the action expects to be re-run after apply. Read-only action classes admit an empty set; mutation-class actions admit any subset of the closed vocabulary.

linked_network_attribution_record_refs.description: Zero or more refs into network_attribution_record entries this action emitted (registry reads, mirror fetches, callback inbounds). Empty when the action operated entirely on local / vendored / offline-bundle state.

__fixture__.description: Optional fixture annotation block. Convention carries the fixture name, scenario, and contract sections exercised; never part of the runtime record.

allOf.description: Read-only action classes resolve to lockfile / transitive / rollback / apply read-only values.
Mutation-class actions MUST NOT resolve to rollback_posture_not_applicable_read_only or apply_not_applicable_read_only.
Lockfile-impact metadata-only paired with a script_risk_class outside the metadata-safe set is forbidden so script / native-build execution is never represented as an ordinary metadata update.
secret_broker_handle_auth MUST cite a non-null secret_broker_handle_ref.
delegated_identity_auth MUST cite a non-null delegated_identity_handle_ref.
policy_injected_credential_auth MUST cite a non-null policy_injected_credential_ref.
managed_service_identity_auth MUST cite a non-null managed_service_identity_ref and is admissible only on managed_workspace identity mode.
mtls_client_certificate_auth MUST cite a non-null mtls_client_certificate_ref.
device_flow_callback_auth MUST cite a non-null device_flow_callback_ref.
raw_secret_in_workspace_state_observed = true is admissible only on audit_only_no_state_change actions; on every other action class a raw secret denies with raw_secret_in_workspace_state_forbidden.

vendored_directory_no_registry and git_or_path_dependency_no_registry sources MUST resolve to no_auth_public_registry or mirror_or_offline_no_auth_required and MUST NOT carry secret-broker / delegated / policy-injected credential refs.

Mutation-class actions under workspace_trust_unset / workspace_trust_restricted / workspace_trust_revoked deny; restore_lockfile_to_checkpoint MAY also run under workspace_trust_session_only_temporary.
Offline / deny-all transport posture MUST be paired with a non-online mirror_or_offline_state_class.
manifest_scope_class out_of_tree_global_manifest_admin_only MUST cite a non-null out_of_tree_global_manifest_envelope and is admissible only on self_hosted_org / managed_workspace identity modes.
rollback_unavailable_destructive_remove_with_no_checkpoint is admissible only on remove_existing_dependency action class.
rollback_via_lockfile_checkpoint MUST cite a non-null lockfile_checkpoint_ref.
rollback_via_workspace_snapshot_checkpoint MUST cite a non-null workspace_snapshot_checkpoint_ref.
apply_failed_state_changed_rollback_executed MUST cite a non-null rollback_record_ref and a rollback_posture_class other than rollback_unavailable_destructive_remove_with_no_checkpoint.
Every terminal apply_outcome (other than apply_in_flight) MUST cite a non-null apply_completed_at.
Denial-class audit events MUST cite a non-null denial_reason_class.
Non-denial audit events MUST leave denial_reason_class null so denial vocabulary is never used as a generic free-text channel.
Every audit event MUST cite at least one of bound_package_action_id_ref or bound_package_review_packet_id_ref so the audit stream is never orphaned.
